name: zxy-visuals
description: ZXY Visuals — static marketing site. The /websites hero uses a WebGL fluid background.

comments.webgl-fluid-enhanced: PINNED to exact 0.6.1 — do NOT use a caret/range. The /websites hero (fluid-hero.js) is written against the 0.6.1 static API (config()/splat()/simulation()/pause()). Newer majors (0.7+/0.8+) switched to a class-based API and will silently break the hero. The browser loads this same pinned version via the esm.sh importmap in websites.html — keep both in sync.
